doc_title: Florida Department of State 2025 Voter Eligibility Clarification Memo
label: fabricated
reason: The document contradicts actual Florida law on LFO requirements, misrepresents the outcome of Jones v. DeSantis, and describes a policy change that has not been enacted, indicating it is not a genuine institutional document.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: This document contradicts actual Florida law (§98.0751 still requires LFO payment), references a court case ("Jones v. DeSantis") that did not produce the described outcome, cites an unverifiable 2024 Auditor General report, and describes a policy change (automatic eligibility regardless of unpaid LFOs) that has not been enacted, all hallmarks of a fabricated institutional document.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The document contradicts actual Florida law on LFO requirements, misrepresents the outcome of Jones v. DeSantis, and describes a policy change that has not been enacted, indicating it is not a genuine institutional document.
